campaignTemplates.title: Sip & Share: New Coffee Launch
campaignTemplates.description: Creators will visit and feature our new coffee blend through authentic, visually engaging content. We're looking for genuine reactions and lifestyle-style shots that make viewers want to try it themselves.
campaignTemplates.objective: Build local buzz and drive foot traffic for the new coffee launch
contentGuidelines: Show the coffee being made or poured
Include at least one clear shot of the cup/branding
Keep the tone warm and casual, not overly scripted
Mention the flavor notes in the caption
campaignTemplates.sampleCaption: Found my new favorite morning ritual ☕️ This new blend has the smoothest finish - if you're a coffee person you need to try this.
campaignTemplates.approvalRequirements: Brand will review draft content within 24 hours before it's posted

campaignTemplates.title: Taste the New Menu
campaignTemplates.description: Creators will dine in and showcase our newest menu items through short-form video and photo content, highlighting flavor, presentation, and the overall dining experience.
campaignTemplates.objective: Drive awareness and reservations for the new menu launch
contentGuidelines: Capture at least 2 signature dishes up close
Include the restaurant's ambience/interior briefly
React authentically to the taste - no overacting
Tag the restaurant's location
campaignTemplates.sampleCaption: This new menu is NOT playing around 🔥 Every dish we tried was better than the last - full review in my stories!
campaignTemplates.approvalRequirements: Brand will review content before posting to ensure dishes are represented accurately

campaignTemplates.title: Style Drop: New Collection
campaignTemplates.description: Creators will style and feature pieces from our new collection in real-life outfits, showing versatility and fit through lookbook-style content.
campaignTemplates.objective: Increase visibility and sales for the new clothing collection
contentGuidelines: Style at least 2 different outfit combinations
Show fit from multiple angles
Mention sizing and fabric feel in caption
Keep lighting natural and true-to-color
campaignTemplates.sampleCaption: Obsessed with how this new drop fits 😍 Styled it two ways - swipe to see both looks!
campaignTemplates.approvalRequirements: Brand will review styling and photos before the post goes live

campaignTemplates.title: Train With Us: Membership Push
campaignTemplates.description: Creators will experience a session at our facility and share their honest workout experience, highlighting the equipment, coaching, and overall vibe to drive membership sign-ups.
campaignTemplates.objective: Grow new membership sign-ups through authentic creator experiences
contentGuidelines: Show a real training or class segment
Capture the facility/equipment briefly
Share one genuine result or feeling after the session
Avoid overly polished, ad-like delivery
campaignTemplates.sampleCaption: First session done and I already feel the difference 💪 The coaching here is next level - full experience in my story.
campaignTemplates.approvalRequirements: Brand will review the session recap before posting

campaignTemplates.title: Glow Up: Product Feature
campaignTemplates.description: Creators will incorporate our product into their skincare/beauty routine and share honest before-and-after style content over a short period.
campaignTemplates.objective: Build trust and drive trial for the featured beauty product
contentGuidelines: Show the product being used in a real routine
Share honest first impressions
Close-up shots of texture/application
No exaggerated claims - keep it authentic
campaignTemplates.sampleCaption: Been using this for a week and my skin already feels different ✨ Full routine breakdown in my stories.
campaignTemplates.approvalRequirements: Brand will review the content before it's posted

campaignTemplates.title: Spread the Word: Brand Campaign
campaignTemplates.description: Creators will create engaging content that introduces our brand to their audience, highlighting what makes it worth trying and encouraging followers to check it out.
campaignTemplates.objective: Increase brand awareness and drive first-time engagement
contentGuidelines: Introduce the brand naturally within the content
Highlight one clear reason to try it
Keep the tone authentic and conversational
Include a clear call-to-action in the caption
campaignTemplates.sampleCaption: Just discovered this and had to share 👀 If you're into this kind of thing, you're going to love it.
campaignTemplates.approvalRequirements: Brand will review draft content before it's posted

descriptionTemplates.text: Creators will feature the product through authentic, appetizing content that captures the taste and experience, encouraging their audience to come try it in person.
Creators will style and showcase the pieces in real outfits, highlighting fit and versatility to inspire their audience to shop the collection.
Creators will share their honest experience trying the service, highlighting what makes it worth a visit and encouraging their audience to book a session.
Creators will incorporate the product into their routine and share honest impressions, helping their audience understand why it's worth trying.
Creators will produce authentic content that introduces the brand to their audience, highlighting what makes it stand out and encouraging viewers to check it out.
